name: WebGPU Kokoro Spike
description: Throwaway spike: prove Kokoro WebGPU inference runs inside an MV3 offscreen document, and benchmark it vs the Docker server.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://huggingface.co https://*.huggingface.co https://*.hf.co
